records.ety: [OE. to bihove for the use of, AS. behōf advantage, a word implied in behōflīc necessary; akin to Sw. behof, Dan. behov, G. behuf, and E. heave, the root meaning to seize, hence the meanings “to hold, make use of.” See Heave, v. t.]

quotes: No mean recompense it brings To your behoof.
